name: Apple Orange Spice Muffins (Ww)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, nutmeg and cloves. Stir in instant nonfat dry milk.
3. Cream margarine with brown sugar until well combined.
4. Add egg yolk and beat on medium speed until thick and creamy.
5. Add diced apples, raisins, orange juice concentrate, apple juice, orange peel to the batter; stir until just combined.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg white with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
7. Fold into batter.
8. Spray eight 2-1/2 inch diameter nonstick muffin pan cups with nonstick cooking spray.
9. Spoon about 1/8 cup of batter into each sprayed cup (each will be about 2/3 full). Partially fill remaining cups with water to prevent the pan from burning or warping.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes, until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove muffins from oven and carefully drain off any excess water.
12. Let cool on a wire rack.
Makes 4 servings of 2 muffins each!
